harrogate_district.rationale: Market town, strong trades economy, tourism crossover. Expected high SSL density in older local business sites.
Cathedral city, heritage tourism + established trades economy. DO NOT reapproach leads from Batch 1 (Ripon Road Carpentry — lead 1, ARCHIVED).
harrogate_district.exclusion_note: Do NOT target lead 1 (Ripon Road Carpentry) under any circumstances — ARCHIVED LOST_NO_RESPONSE

harrogate_district.rationale: Small market town — A1 corridor trades. Fewer businesses = less competition from other outreach agencies.

craven_district.rationale: Largest Craven market town. Broad sector mix. Expected highest SSL density.
Rural market town, Dales gateway. Strong trades + hospitality. No-website leads possible.
Tourist village — hospitality and trades. No-website BAB angle strong (National Park visitors rely on Google search).
Small village — limited volume but very low outreach competition. Any lead here is likely first-touch.

ssl_pas.minimum_bar: HTTP (not HTTPS), any sector except fitness/wellness

mobile_pas.minimum_bar: SSL clean AND mobile clearly broken — show you tested it

no_website_bab.minimum_bar: 4★+ AND 20+ reviews — rural bar (same as Ryedale)

aida.minimum_bar: 4.5★+ AND 100+ reviews only — verifiable keyword gap

batch_6_scrape_plan.no_website_exception: 4★+ AND 20+ reviews with confirmed owner name — can email at 50+
enrichment_priority_order: Owner name known + website URL → fastest, highest reply rate
No website, 4★+ 20+ reviews → Companies House + phone lookup
linkedin_rules_batch_6: MUST execute Day 3-7 from initial send (Fri 2026-06-05 is Day 3 — DO NOT DEFER)
profiles.json MUST be written same session as execution — one entry per lead, no batching
If profiles.json not written same session: that session's LinkedIn did not happen for BRAIN purposes

Connection note: 200-char hard limit, start with name, mention specific business, end low-pressure
After connection accepted: wait 3-5 days, send ONE short value message (no pitch, no email reference)
batch_6_scrape_plan.hands_scraping_instructions: Use Google Maps scraper (src/outlocal/scrapers/) to search '[sector] [town]' for each target town. Export per-lead data file (leads.json) with: business_name, owner_name (if findable), email, website_url, ssl_status, mobile_score, review_count, star_rating, signal_type, signal_notes, lead_score. Write to data/batch_6_leads.json same session. Share with BRAIN for signal assignment before Day-0 sends.
